**Source:** [Device Tree Specification](https://devicetree-specification.readthedocs.io/)

## #reset-cells

Property name: `#reset-cells`

Value type: `<u32>`

Number of cells in a reset specifier for this reset provider.

---

**Source:** Linux kernel Documentation

```
- #reset-cells: Must be 1

The g3dsys controller uses the common clk binding from
Documentation/devicetree/bindings/clock/clock-bindings.txt
The available clocks are defined in dt-bindings/clock/mt*-clk.h.

Example:
```
